name: Cheddar Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first six ingredients in a bowl.
2. Form the mixture into five patties.
3. Grill or broil the patties to your desired level of doneness.
4. Serve in toasted sandwich buns.
5. Top with additional Heinz 57 Sauce if desired.
6. Makes 5 servings.
